<li>amenorrhea (disease)（99.7%）</li>

<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（97.4%）</li>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（97.4%）</li>
<li>biotin metabolic disease（97.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
